name: Sourdough Pizza Shells
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the sourdough starter with salt and flour until a soft dough forms.
2. Knead the dough to work in all ingredients, forming it into a ball.
3. Roll out the dough thinly on a lightly floured surface.
4. Place the rolled-out dough onto a baking sheet coated with oil.
5. Bake at 425°F (220°C) for about 5 minutes until edges are slightly browned.
6. Prepare pizza sauce and toppings as desired.
7. Assemble pizzas using the shells, sauce, and toppings.
8. Finish baking according to your preferred method.
